task_completion.description: The Chinook database is opened in LibreOffice Base.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Base application window is visible with 'chinook' or 'chinook.odb' in the title bar or database pane.

task_completion.description: A new table named 'Person' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Tables' section in LibreOffice Base lists a table named 'Person'.

task_completion.description: The 'Person' table has the correct columns defined.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The table design or data view shows columns specifically named 'FirstName', 'LastName', 'Email', and 'Role'.

task_completion.description: Customer records are populated with the correct Role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data view of the 'Person' table shows rows containing names/emails with the value 'Customer' in the Role column.

task_completion.description: Employee records are populated with the correct Role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data view of the 'Person' table shows rows containing names/emails with the value 'Employee' in the Role column.
The record navigation bar at the bottom of the table data view shows '67' as the total number of records (e.g., 'Record 1 of 67'), or a SQL query result explicitly shows a count of 67.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the LibreOffice Base GUI or its internal SQL execution tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreOffice Base interface being used to create tables or run SQL, rather than terminal commands modifying the database file directly.

integrity.description: The data in the table comes from the actual Chinook database.
integrity.visual_evidence: The names and emails visible in the 'Person' table appear to be genuine Chinook sample data (e.g., real-looking names) rather than dummy text like 'test' or 'user1'.

integrity.description: The results are shown in a database application, not a spreadsheet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The table is displayed within the LibreOffice Base application window, not mocked up in LibreOffice Calc or a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Chinook database contains exactly 67 individuals in total: 59 Customers and 8 Employees. The final 'Person' table must reflect exactly 67 rows. The database file is located at /home/ga/chinook.odb.
